summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TabPilot Chrome Extension web preview. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend interactive sidebar working with all major features including search, tab management, settings, context menus, and toast notifications.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful creation

minor_missing_features.issue: Group by Domain toggle button not clearly identifiable in testing
minor_missing_features.selector: Quick action buttons found but specific domain grouping button unclear

minor_missing_features.issue: Pin/unpin buttons may be hidden until hover (normal behavior)
Window minimize/close buttons not found in expected locations

passed_tests: Web preview loads with hero section and interactive sidebar
Search bar filters tabs in real-time with result count display
Tab clicking triggers 'Switched to' toast notifications
Tab close button removes tabs and shows 'Tab closed' toast
Right-click context menu opens with Switch/Pin/Mute/Move/Close options
Settings panel opens with theme toggles (Light/Dark/System)
Settings toggles for show favicons, show URLs, compact mode work
Multiple windows displayed (Window 1, 2, 3) with proper tab organization
Tab groups visible with blue 'Work' group indicator
Duplicate detection panel shows '1 duplicate' count
Quick Actions bar has 6+ interactive buttons
Stats bar displays window/tab counts at bottom
Toast notifications system working for all actions
Hero section links (Download Extension, GitHub) present
Backend API GET /api/ returns correct message
Backend API GET /api/sessions returns session list
Backend API POST /api/sessions creates sessions successfully
